titleStmt.title: Transcription and Translation of DCA DCD Misc. Ch. 558

respStmt.resp: Exported from Models of Authority data
respStmt.name: tei_exporter

availability.p: Status unknown. Exported for research and migration workflows.

revisionDesc.change: transcription moa=829 status=reviewed modified=2022-11-01 14:52:15.812648+00 | translation moa=828 status=reviewed modified=2022-11-01 14:52:15.821741+00

p.cl:
Eadgarus dei gratia rex scottorum  Omnibus suis fidelibus per regnum suum scottis et anglis .
salutem .

Sciatis quod ego dono in elemosinam . deo et Sancto Cuthberto et monachis
eius Fiscwic tam in terris quam in aquis . et cum omnibus sibi adiacentibus .
et nominatim illam terram quę iacet inter Horuerdene et Cnapadene . pro
anima patris et matris meę . et pro salute animę . meę et fratrum meorum
et sororum liberam et quietam tenendam et habendam et ad uoluntatem mo
nachorum Sancti Cuthberti domini mei disponendam .
Edgar by the grace of God king of the Scots, to all his sworn men throughout his kingdom, Gaelic and English, greeting.

Know that I give Fishwick in alms to God and to Saint Cuthbert and his monks, as much in lands as in waters, and with everything belonging to it, namely the land that lies between Horndean and Nabdean, for the soul of my father and mother, and for the salvation of my own soul, and of my brothers' and sisters' [souls], to hold and to have free and quit, and to be disposed at the will of the monks of my lord, Saint Cuthbert.
